docket_entries.description: TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE AND MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY ANDREW DIMITRIOU
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

APPEAL OF TWO CLOSELY RELATED SMALL CLAIMS CASES - JIANG V. CHOW (CSM-19-861216) AND JIANG V. SINGH (CSM-19-861214) WERE TRIED DE NOVO ON JANUARY 8-9, 2020 BEFORE THE HON. RICHARD B. ULMER JR. AFTER TESTIMONY, ADMISSION OF EXHIBITS, AND CLOSING ARGUMENT, THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT HONG JIANG'S DAMAGES IN THE TWO CASES ARE THE SAME, SO THE $10,000.00 (PLUS $100 IN COSTS) PREVIOUSLY AWARDED IN EACH CASE SEPARATELY IS NOW AWARDED ONLY ONCE. DEFENDANT/APPELLANT CATHERINE CHOW AND DEFENDANT/APPELLANT PETER SINGH ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR THOSE AMOUNTS. THE COURT FURTHER AFFIRMS JUDGE KARNOW'S FINDING THAT CHOW "MAY FILE HER OWN LAWSUIT, INCLUDING IF APPROPRIATE A SMALL CLAIMS CASE, TO RECOVER THE [RENT] MONEY SHE BELIEVES SHE IS OWED BY [MS. JIANG]." SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. JUDGE: HON. RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: R. MICHAEL DILES; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D306)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT JIANG, HONG RECOVER FROM APPELLANT SINGH, PETER $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,100.00, ***IMPORTANT*** APPEAL OF TWO CLOSELY RELATED SMALL CLAIMS CASES - JIANG V. CHOW (CSM-19-861216) AND JIANG V. SINGH (CSM-19-861214) WERE TRIED DE NOVO ON JANUARY 8-9, 2020. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT HONG JIANG'S DAMAGES IN THE TWO CASES ARE THE SAME, SO THE $10,000.00 (PLUS $100 IN COSTS) PREVIOUSLY AWARDED IN EACH CASE SEPARATELY IS NOW AWARDED ONLY ONCE. DEFENDANT/APPELLANT CATHERINE CHOW AND DEFENDANT/APPELLANT PETER SINGH ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR THOSE AMOUNTS. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 THE COURT DENIES YOUR REQUEST BECAUSE IT IS INCOMPLETE. YOU HAVE 10 DAYS AFTER THE CLERK GIVES NOTICE OF THIS ORDER TO: PAY YOUR FEES AND COSTS, OR FILE A NEW REVISED REQUEST. AS TO PLAINTIFF JIANG, HONG

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

William P. Klein, Esq., for and with Plaintiff/Respondent Hong Jiang
Andrew Dimitriou, Esq. for and with Defendant/Appellant Peter Singh

Mr. Klein commences direct examination of Hong Jiang.
Mr. Klein introduces Plaintiff's Exhibit 1A [Check #104 - $7146.30 - Jiang to Chun].
Mr. Klein concludes direct examination of Hong Jiang. Mr. Dimitriou commences cross examination of Hong Jiang.
Mr. Dimitriou introduces a Declaration of Hong Pham.
Mr. Dimitriou concludes cross-examination of Hong Jiang. Mr. Klein commences examination of Peter Singh pursuant to Evidence Code Sec. 776.
Mr. Klein concludes examination of Peter Singh pursuant to Evidence Code Sec. 776. Mr. Dimitriou commences direct examination of Peter Singh pursuant to Evidence Code Sec. 776.
Parties rest.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1A is admitted into evidence. The Court determines that CSM-19-861216 is directly related to the facts and allegations of this case and incorporates the exhibits from CSM-19-861216 into evidence in the instant case.
The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Set For Trial On Jan-08-20 At 10:40 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Continued To Jan-08-20 At 09:15 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Continued To Jan-09-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 306
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

William P. Klein, Esq., for and with Plaintiff/Respondent Hong Jiang
Andrew Dimitriov, Esq. for and with Defendant/Appellant Peter Singh

The Court proceeded with related case CSM-19-861216 this date. This matter was continued to January 9, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. pending conclusion of the related case.

Judge: Hon. Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-04-2019 Continued To Jan-08-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Atty William P. Klein of Klein Law Group for Plaintiff/Respondent Hong Jiang, who is also present.
Peter Singh Defendant/Appellant is also present. Defendant's Atty Andrew Dimitriou of Dimitriou Law Firm is not present.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. Matter is Continued to Wednesday January 8, 2020 at 9:00am in Department 525. The Court orders Monetary Sanctions in the amount of $550.00 against Defendant Peter Singh and his Attorney Andrew Dimitriou. This is a joint and several obligation of Defendants (Defendant Catherine Chow CSM-19-861216). Proceedings not reported; Judge: Henry Shain; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (D525).
